name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 21 Oct 2022
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"While the development team continues to work on some exciting new features, this release sees fixes to a couple of recent issues."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the Maropost Analytics link in the Maropost Commerce Cloud Control Panel was pointing to the old "},{"type":"a","url":"https://analytics.netohq.com","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"analytics.netohq.com"}]},{"text":" URL. This would result in users receiving a Privacy Error as the SSL certificate for this domain had expired."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":" The link in the control panel now directs to "},{"type":"a","url":"https://analytics.maropost.com","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"analytics.maropost.com"}]},{"text":"."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with the Maropost Commerce Cloud MYOB integration add-on when exporting to AccountRight 2022.8 would result throw ‘Error 173 UidInPostBody: A request should not contain UID during POST operation’. Updated integration to use PUT request rather than using POST requests to meet the changes put in place by MYOB."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
